text: - 2.9 DELIVERIES: All deliveries for Subcontractor shall be coordinated through Contractor 48 hours in advance. If scheduled deliveries are not ready at the appointed time or if deliveries arrive without the ability to be unloaded during working hours set forth in the Work Rules, Contractor will refuse acceptance of materials and require deliveries to be rescheduled. Contractor will not allow delivery of materials to site without Subcontractor being represented on-site. Contractor will not receive, sign-for, accept or be responsible for materials delivered to the site or office trailer.
